title: Academy
subtitle: Fundamentals every serious player must master — from beginner to advanced.

math.title: Intuitive Math
math.desc: Pot odds, outs counting and call/fold — exercises generated from your own error spots.

board_strength.title: Hand Strength on the Board
board_strength.desc: Classify your hand and board texture. Knowing where you stand is the foundation of every post-flop decision.

position.title: Position Fundamentals
position.desc: Understand why position is the most persistent asset in poker and how it affects your realized equity.

math_intermediate.title: Equity & Rule of 2/4
math_intermediate.desc: Calculate equity with outs, use the 2/4 rule, and combine draws with pot odds without a calculator.

ranges.title: Ranges by Stack Depth
ranges.desc: Build and adjust ranges for push/fold, open and 3-bet as stack depth changes throughout the tournament.

bet_sizing.title: Bet Sizing 101
bet_sizing.desc: Every wrong bet has an invisible cost. Learn the correct sizings and what each one communicates to opponents.

tournament.title: Tournament Context
tournament.desc: SPR & commitment, ICM on the bubble and FT, equity in 3-bet pots — spots where chip EV ≠ tournament EV.

ranges_advanced.title: Range Advantage
ranges_advanced.desc: Identify who has range advantage on different board textures and how to exploit it with bet sizing.

math.title: Intuitive Math
math.subtitle: Pot odds, outs and call/fold in your own error spots.

mathInt.title: Equity & Rule of 2/4
mathInt.subtitle: Calculate equity with outs and compare with pot odds without a calculator.

board.title: Hand Strength on the Board
board.subtitle: Accurately classify your hand and board texture.

tournament.title: Tournament Context
tournament.subtitle: SPR, ICM and decisions where chip EV ≠ tournament EV.
